heroImageAlt: A calm wellbeing treatment environment at Dove Cottage
mainIntro1: Our aim is to offer you an opportunity to relax and indulge in some self-care during your time here at Dove Cottage.
mainIntro2: These therapies are not offered as a replacement to the medical treatments you are already undergoing, but to complement them and support you as you navigate this stage of your life.
benefitsHeading: Complementary therapy treatments have been proven to provide the following benefits

benefitsList.text: Reduce feelings of worry or stress
Improve quality of sleep and help regulate sleep patterns
Reduce production of Cortisol (the stress hormone)

treatmentsIntro: Our fully-qualified complementary therapists offer a range of treatments that can be received safely alongside your current medical care, including:
referralIntro: For more information or to book a session, please complete the
referralOutro: and someone will get in touch with you to discuss in more detail.
sideFormHint: Enquire about complementary therapies or book a session.
